overview.Name: Cytokinetics Inc
overview.Description: Cytokinetics, Incorporated, an advanced stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on discovering, developing and commercializing muscle activators and inhibitors as potential treatments for debilitating diseases. The company is headquartered in South San Francisco, California.
overview.Address: 350 OYSTER POINT BOULEVARD, SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, CA, UNITED STATES, 94080
